name: Batam Centre Ferry Terminal
blurb_id: Terminal tersibuk dan paling fleksibel. Banyak rute ke Singapura (HarbourFront) & Johor.
blurb_en: The busiest, most flexible terminal. Many routes to Singapore (HarbourFront) & Johor.

name: Harbour Bay Ferry Terminal
blurb_id: Sekitar 45 menit dari HarbourFront Singapura, paling dekat ke pusat Nagoya.
blurb_en: About 45 minutes from Singapore's HarbourFront, closest to downtown Nagoya.

name: Sekupang International Ferry Terminal
blurb_id: Di sisi barat, sekitar 30–40 menit dari pusat kota. Juga melayani domestik.
blurb_en: On the west side, about 30–40 minutes from the city centre. Also serves domestic routes.

name: Nongsapura Ferry Terminal
blurb_id: Sisi timur, dekat kawasan Nongsa, resort, dan Bandara Hang Nadim.
blurb_en: East side, close to Nongsa's resorts and Hang Nadim Airport.
